name: Rich City
short_description: Rich City - Real-time strategy and clicker in one person. Take the reins and make a real economic oasis in the middle of an empty meadow! Build and demolish buildings, collect profits, fulfill the demands of the citizens and you will definitely be rewarded for your labors!
detailed_description:
Rich City - Real-time strategy and clicker in one person. Take the reins and make a real economic oasis in the middle of an empty meadow! Build and demolish buildings, collect profits, fulfill the demands of the citizens and you will definitely be rewarded for your labors! Bring this patch of land to life.
Perhaps you’ll create your perfect city and achieve profitability!


Game features:
3D Graphics: The game is visually appealing and allows you to see your city in three-dimensional space.
5 Types of Buildings: You have access to various building types, such as offices, factories, and shops. Choose wisely to ensure your city thrives.
